case_title: HAHN,PHILIP B. DBA GALBRATH GOLF DRIVING RANGE VS PARK,DANIEL-DBA PARK'S INSURANCE CENTER

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,769.00 FILED BY HAHN,PHILIP B. DBA GALBRATH GOLF DRIVING RANGE AS TO DEFENDANT PARK,DANIEL-DBA PARK'S INSURANCE CENTER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-24-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAHN,PHILIP B. DBA GALBRATH GOLF DRIVING RANGE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PARK,DANIEL-DBA PARK'S INSURANCE CENTER STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-24-1993, CONTINUED BY COURT TO AUG-30-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
CERT. RECEIPT TO DANIEL PARK RETURNED SIGNED.
